## Meeting Purpose

[Final interview with Aida for the Managing Editor position at fwd.digital.](https://fathom.video/share/o4vK1G4Lu9Pqm-A6jnD4yusK7qfnE4cn?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Aida is an experienced content strategist with a strong track record in SEO and client management](https://fathom.video/share/o4vK1G4Lu9Pqm-A6jnD4yusK7qfnE4cn?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [She's seeking a role where she can help build processes and grow with a small company](https://fathom.video/share/o4vK1G4Lu9Pqm-A6jnD4yusK7qfnE4cn?tab=summary&timestamp=62.0)
  - [Marcel emphasized the importance of hiring high-caliber talent due to fwd.digital's reputation and client base](https://fathom.video/share/o4vK1G4Lu9Pqm-A6jnD4yusK7qfnE4cn?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)
  - [The ideal candidate should demonstrate extreme ownership, resourcefulness, and the ability to work autonomously](https://fathom.video/share/o4vK1G4Lu9Pqm-A6jnD4yusK7qfnE4cn?tab=summary&timestamp=303.0)

## Topics

### Company Background and Growth Strategy

  - [fwd.digital grew rapidly to 20 clients and $2M annual revenue in 4 months](https://fathom.video/share/o4vK1G4Lu9Pqm-A6jnD4yusK7qfnE4cn?tab=summary&timestamp=235.0)
  - [Started with high-profile clients like Reddit and Grant Thornton](https://fathom.video/share/o4vK1G4Lu9Pqm-A6jnD4yusK7qfnE4cn?tab=summary&timestamp=314.0)
  - [Currently focusing on controlled growth and deeper engagements with existing clients](https://fathom.video/share/o4vK1G4Lu9Pqm-A6jnD4yusK7qfnE4cn?tab=summary&timestamp=334.0)
  - [Prioritizing team building and process development over rapid client acquisition](https://fathom.video/share/o4vK1G4Lu9Pqm-A6jnD4yusK7qfnE4cn?tab=summary&timestamp=341.0)

### Candidate's Professional Approach

  - [Described as thorough and reliable by previous managers](https://fathom.video/share/o4vK1G4Lu9Pqm-A6jnD4yusK7qfnE4cn?tab=summary&timestamp=436.0)
  - [Emphasizes anticipating complications and building buffer time into project timelines](https://fathom.video/share/o4vK1G4Lu9Pqm-A6jnD4yusK7qfnE4cn?tab=summary&timestamp=486.0)
  - [Values honesty, transparency, and clear communication with clients](https://fathom.video/share/o4vK1G4Lu9Pqm-A6jnD4yusK7qfnE4cn?tab=summary&timestamp=149.0)
  - [Proud accomplishment: 12x organic traffic growth for a fintech client in one year](https://fathom.video/share/o4vK1G4Lu9Pqm-A6jnD4yusK7qfnE4cn?tab=summary&timestamp=1014.0)

### Role Expectations and Growth Opportunities

  - [Managing 3-5 clients, with support from freelancers and internal experts](https://fathom.video/share/o4vK1G4Lu9Pqm-A6jnD4yusK7qfnE4cn?tab=summary&timestamp=1531.0)
  - [Opportunity to develop end-to-end strategies and move into more consultative roles](https://fathom.video/share/o4vK1G4Lu9Pqm-A6jnD4yusK7qfnE4cn?tab=summary&timestamp=1408.0)
  - [Two-month performance expectation: become indispensable to both clients and the fwd.digital team](https://fathom.video/share/o4vK1G4Lu9Pqm-A6jnD4yusK7qfnE4cn?tab=summary&timestamp=1622.0)
  - [Success factors: extreme curiosity, ownership, accountability, and resourcefulness](https://fathom.video/share/o4vK1G4Lu9Pqm-A6jnD4yusK7qfnE4cn?tab=summary&timestamp=1677.0)

### Company Culture and Values

  - [Emphasis on hiring self-motivated "managers of one"](https://fathom.video/share/o4vK1G4Lu9Pqm-A6jnD4yusK7qfnE4cn?tab=summary&timestamp=1705.0)
  - [Encourages work-life balance to prevent burnout](https://fathom.video/share/o4vK1G4Lu9Pqm-A6jnD4yusK7qfnE4cn?tab=summary&timestamp=1766.0)
  - [Values people who take pride in their work and maintain high standards](https://fathom.video/share/o4vK1G4Lu9Pqm-A6jnD4yusK7qfnE4cn?tab=summary&timestamp=1802.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to follow up with reference checks](https://fathom.video/share/o4vK1G4Lu9Pqm-A6jnD4yusK7qfnE4cn?tab=summary&timestamp=1822.0)
  - [Final decision expected within the next two days](https://fathom.video/share/o4vK1G4Lu9Pqm-A6jnD4yusK7qfnE4cn?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
  - [If selected, Aida's ideal start time would be in three weeks to accommodate current client commitments](https://fathom.video/share/o4vK1G4Lu9Pqm-A6jnD4yusK7qfnE4cn?tab=summary&timestamp=1836.0)
